query:
SELECT 
  mp.id as planId,
  mp.name as planName,
  COUNT(DISTINCT mi.id) as materialCount,
  COUNT(DISTINCT msm.id) as mappingCount
FROM material_plans mp
LEFT JOIN material_items mi ON mp.id = mi.planId
LEFT JOIN material_supplier_mappings msm ON mi.materialCode = msm.materialCode
GROUP BY mp.id, mp.name
ORDER BY mp.id;
